title: 1.20.1 modpack by SebaoPL
body:
A smooth, immersive survival experience focused on realism, creativity, and calm gameplay.
Build detailed houses, explore beautiful biomes, farm, cook, and live your own life — without grind or pressure.

⚙️ Optimized for performance (Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix)
🏡 Tons of building & decoration mods (Macaw’s, Handcrafted, Beautify)
🌎 Natural world & life (Biomes O’ Plenty, Naturalist, Tidal Towns)
🍲 Survival & farming (Farmer’s Delight, Comforts, Carry On)
🎮 Controller-friendly and shader compatible

Perfect for players who just want to chill, build, and enjoy Minecraft at its best.
